user_message: I want a full refund for my subscription. I signed up 3 weeks ago and the product is not what was advertised. I want my money back now.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Within 30-day window. Verified. No fraud. No legal hold. Everything qualifies for full refund.
Step 2: EXCEPT active_chargeback is true → Section 6.1: NO refunds during active chargeback.
Step 3: Must escalate to Billing with chargeback_dispute reason.
MISS: All signals point to full refund. Chargeback is one field among many.

wrong_but_tempting.why_tempting: Perfect refund candidate except for the chargeback flag.
